raw_text: Team sync — Q2 planning. Attendees: Alice Chen (PM), Bob Rivera (Eng Lead), Carol Kim (Design). Alice opened: project deadline is June 30th. Bob confirmed the API v2 milestone is on track for May 15th. Carol noted the design system doc is blocked on stakeholder review. Action items: Bob to unblock Carol by EOD Friday.

Slack message from David Park: @team the Redis migration is complete. All cache keys now use the new namespace prefix. No action needed from anyone else. FYI — latency dropped from 45ms to 12ms on the search endpoint. Kudos to the infra team!

Document: Engineering Onboarding Guide (excerpt). New engineers joining the Platform team report to Bob Rivera. The team owns the core API, the worker pipeline, and the CLI. Key tools: GitHub for code review, Linear for task tracking, Notion for documentation. First week focus: set up local dev environment using the README, complete the security training, and shadow a code review.

1:1 notes — Alice and Carol. Status: design system rebrand is 70% done. Blocker: need final brand color approval from the CEO. Owner: Carol Kim is responsible for the design system. Deadline: colors approved by April 28th so dev can start integration. Carol to present three options to leadership at the Thursday meeting.

Slack thread in #backend — Bob Rivera: shipping the v2 auth service today. Breaking change: the /token endpoint now returns a structured error object instead of a plain string. All clients must update. Frank Liu confirmed that the iOS app is updated. Grace Wong flagged that the web dashboard still uses the old format — she owns that migration and targets next Tuesday.
